Number & Operations in Base Ten.description: Understand place value relationships in the base-ten system and perform operations with multi-digit whole numbers.

Number & Operations—Fractions.description: Extend understanding of fractions as numbers, including fraction equivalence, comparison, and simple operations with fractions.

Operations & Algebraic Thinking.description: Use the four operations to solve problems and analyze arithmetic patterns and relationships.

Measurement & Data.description: Solve problems involving measurement and represent and interpret data, including concepts such as area, angles, and line plots.

Number & Operations in Base Ten.description: Understand the base-ten number system and perform operations with multi-digit numbers and decimals.

Number & Operations—Fractions.description: Understand fractions as numbers and perform operations with fractions, including addition and subtraction with unlike denominators.

Operations & Algebraic Thinking.description: Analyze arithmetic expressions and numerical patterns and reason about relationships between quantities.
